expectedVerification: compare-worktree flags a change outside the allowed paths
reviewRequirement: n/a — acceptance blocked at worktree comparison
commitExpectation: no commit; the out-of-scope change is rejected
forbidden: accepting a unit whose actual diff touches files outside ALLOWED_PATHS
trusting filesChanged over the real git diff
stop_condition: compare-worktree reports OUTSIDE_ALLOWED_PATH (or an omitted / false-reported file); the controller rejects the unit and does not commit
human_checks: confirm compare-worktree reported a path violation
confirm the actual git diff — not the report — drove the rejection
